audience: Experts, consultants, trainers and marketing, HR or L&D teams turning specialist knowledge into a professional masterclass video
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Bedrijven en experts helpen beslissen hoe ze een zakelijke masterclass inhoudelijk afbakenen, professioneel opnemen en bruikbaar publiceren

searchIntent.question: How should a business define, record and publish a professional masterclass video?
searchIntent.geographicContext: English-speaking businesses and experts in Belgium, particularly Limburg, Belgium, Flanders and neighbouring regions

directAnswer: To record a useful business masterclass, define one observable outcome for a specific audience, build a focused content route and test the hardest section as a pilot. Plan the expert's delivery, set, sound, visuals, rights, accessibility, editing, publication and reuse as one production.
title: Record a masterclass for business: from expertise to video
metaDescription: Plan a professional business masterclass around audience, outcome, script, speaker, set, sound, rights, captions, publication and responsible reuse.
h1: Record a masterclass for business: from expertise to a strong video
factsToPreserve: A masterclass usually explores one defined expertise question and is not automatically a full online course
Video does not guarantee learning outcomes, reach or revenue
The number of cameras must follow the content rather than prestige
Recording permission and permission for further use are distinct
Accurate captions are important for prerecorded video; a transcript does not replace synchronised captions for every user
Video SEO requirements do not guarantee visibility
Production cost depends on preparation, recording complexity, editing, accessibility and versions rather than final running time alone
